description: relax rsi14_max to 40 — more trades from less restrictive RSI
relax rsi14_max to 45 — even less restrictive
relax rsi14_max to 50 — nearly disable RSI filter
relax ibs_confirm to 0.6 — more permissive oversold trigger
relax ibs_confirm to 0.7 — even more permissive
tighten ibs_confirm to 0.4 — more selective, with sma200=False
tighten ibs_confirm to 0.35 — between grid points
push ibs_confirm to 0.9 — nearly disable IBS entry filter
lower vol_surge to 1.0 — average volume is enough
lower vol_surge to 0.8 — below-avg volume ok
atr_stop_mult 1.2: tighter stop, cut losers faster
ibs_exit 0.7: exit on weaker overbought signal
ibs_exit 0.9: only exit on strong overbought
combo: tight stop 1.2x + short hold 5d — aggressive risk mgmt
combo: tiny gap -0.5% + relaxed RSI 40 — wider net
combo: tiny gap + tight IBS 0.5 — quality filter
combo: fast SMA3 exit + lower IBS exit 0.7 — quick profits
combo: longer hold 10d + slower SMA7 exit — let winners run
radical: enable earnings blackout — skip earnings gaps
radical: ibs_confirm 0.95 — nearly disable IBS filter
radical: 2-day hold + 1x ATR stop — ultra-short swing
